zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Greystoke於1387年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，她的父親Ralph Greystoke34歲，母親Katherine de Clifford34歲。她於1405年8月7日與Eude Welles在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1416年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Greystoke于1387年出生在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，她的父亲Ralph Greystoke34岁，母亲Katherine de Clifford34岁。她于1405年8月7日与Eude Welles在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1416年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年29岁。

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Greystoke was born in 1387, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Greystoke, was 34 and her mother, Katherine de Clifford, was 34. She married Eude Welles on 7 August 1405, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1416, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Greystoke est née en 1387, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Greystoke, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Clifford, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Eude Welles le 7 août 1405, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1416, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Greystoke 1387 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Greystoke 34 und ihre Mutter Katherine de Clifford 34. Sie hat am 7. August 1405 in Lincolnshire, England Eude Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1416 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Greystoke è nata il nel 1387 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph Greystoke, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Katherine de Clifford, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Eude Welles il 7 agosto 1405, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1416, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Greystokeが1387年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父Ralph Greystokeは34歳，母Katherine de Cliffordは34歳であった。1405年8月7日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでEude Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1416年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Greystoke(이)가 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Greystoke(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine de Clifford(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1405년 8월 7일 영국 링코실르에서 Eude Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Greystoke nasceu em 1387, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Greystoke, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Clifford, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Eude Welles em 7 de agosto de 1405, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1416, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Greystoke родилась в 1387 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Greystoke было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Clifford, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eude Welles 7 августа 1405 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1416 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Greystoke nació en 1387, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Greystoke, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Katherine de Clifford, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Eude Welles el 7 de agosto de 1405, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1416, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años.
